SELECT FLOOR(value) AS floored_value FROM numbers WHERE value > 0;
SELECT n.value, FLOOR(n.value) AS floored_value FROM numbers n WHERE n.value BETWEEN -10 AND 10;
SELECT a.num, FLOOR(a.num) AS floored_num, b.value FROM additional_numbers a JOIN numbers b ON FLOOR(a.num) = b.value;
SELECT n.value, (FLOOR(n.value) + 10) AS adjusted_floor FROM numbers n;
SELECT FLOOR(SUBQUERY.floored_value) FROM (SELECT FLOOR(value) AS floored_value FROM numbers) AS SUBQUERY;
SELECT n.value, FLOOR(n.value) AS floored_value FROM numbers n WHERE FLOOR(n.value) IN (SELECT FLOOR(num) FROM additional_numbers);
